reference.domains: (topic reference) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c reference oceReference-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
reference.title: Security requirements

section.title: Connected device
section.p: The operating system used to connect to the network is Windows 10 IoT Enterprise LTSC 2019.

li.p: TCP port 80 (HTTP for Back channel and Web user interface)
TCP port 443 (HTTPS for secure Web user interface)
TCP port 443 (HTTPS for On Remote Services, and On device Technical Service Manual updates)
TCP port 80 (Firmware downloads and teamviewer network availability check
UDP port 123 (NTP protocol for time synchronization)

section.title: URL white list for Firewall/Proxy outbound connection (for On Remote Service)
section.p: URL white list for Firewall/Proxy outbound connection (for On Remote Service):

li.p: Cmtime.codemeter.com, port 443 (for Code meter Time Server used for licenses)
<NTP server name> (NTP server configured in Settings Editor if NTP client is enabled)
Deep packet investigation must be disabled on the remoteservices-cs.cpp.canon connection.
This connection uses OpenVPN. Activated deep packet investigation will block the VPN connection.
OpenVPN must be allowed as application for this device in firewalls/proxy.
